prestazioni: Supercharged 5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III (engine code: AJ133S) upgraded with a Harrop HTV2650 TVS supercharger (14.5psi boost, 750+ HP) paired with a custom JMS Racing ported/polished intake manifold and ID1000 fuel injectors for methanol-water injection support

Full titanium exhaust system by Milltek Sport (3.5-inch diameter, non-resonated, valved rear section) with custom X-pipe crossover and GESI catalytic converters (200-cell) for emissions compliance without flow restriction

Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound, 2-way damping) with Eibach ERS race springs (12kg/mm front, 16kg/mm rear) and polyurethane subframe bushings by SuperPro (SPF0115K) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof
APR Performance GT-250 adjustable carbon fiber rear wing (3D-printed titanium mounting pedestals) with integrated Gurney flap and LED brake light strip
Custom front splitter by Anderson Composites (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) with integrated air curtains and Vortex Generators, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber trunk lid (weight reduction: 12kg)
